calendar.matters:
Ntc And Motion In Support Of Motion To Set Aside Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-04-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- DARRYL VESSELS, TEL. NO. 447-2767, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - DEFENDANT DARRYL VESSELS Motion To Set Aside Judgment IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO SHOW EXCUSABLE NEGLECT GIVEN CREDIBLE EVIDENCE THAT IN FACT HE WAS NOT INCAPACITATED ON THE DAY OF THE TRIAL. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =301/PJB/AL

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-19-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-19-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.
Michael Rossoff, Esq. appeared for plaintiff VPM Management, Inc.
Joyce Perryman, property manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Darryl Vessels.

The plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Tenancy Agreement dated 12/19/06----------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Notice to Pay Rent of Surrendar
Possession dated 01/10/08-----------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff VPM Management, Inc. and against defendant DARRYL VESSELS as follows:

Plaintiff shall recover from defendant DARRYL VESSELS Rent and Per Diem Damages in the sum of $351.04, Costs in the amount of $120.00, for a total judgment of $471.04.
Plaintiff VPM Management, Inc. is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1030 Post Street, #108, San Francisco, CA 94109. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-13-2008 Off Calendar
